# Frontend Route Reachability Matrix

Per frontend route (enumerated from `apps/dentalemon/src/routeTree.gen.ts`), whether any e2e/journey spec navigates toward it. `exercisedByE2E` is a **reachability proxy** — a spec references the route's navigation literal — **not** a render-smoke. A route can be exercised yet still 500 on mount; the follow-up is a per-route render-smoke (mount each route, assert no error boundary / console error). A **gap** is a route no spec exercises.

|--------|------:|
| Total routes | 23 |
| Exercised by e2e/journeys | 21 |
| **Gap (no spec navigates to it)** | **2** |
